name: S-18 consumption trace records the --commit-sha argument in the trace per the §2.18 contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha deadbeef --consulted-standards google-tsguide --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'deadbeef' trace.json && echo recorded 1>&2
